top_signals.title: Ukraine expects NATO summit to discuss funding despite trouble securing backing
top_signals.summary: Ukrainian Ambassador to Turkey Nariman Dzhelialov suggests each NATO member contributes a small proportion of its budget.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Memory Chip Frenzy Sends SK Hynix, Micron Into $1 Trillion Club
top_signals.summary: SK Hynix Inc. joined Micron Technology Inc. in surpassing the $1 trillion market capitalization milestone, reflecting investors’ intensifying enthusiasm for advanced chips powering artificial intelligence.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US Consumer Confidence Eases as Inflation Worries Mount - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: US Consumer Confidence Eases as Inflation Worries Mount  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Rubio seeks to repair U.S.-India relations after Trump-era strains
top_signals.summary: Several pillars of the U.S.-India relationship have been undermined under U.S. President Donald Trump.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
